name: task-manager
description: Monorepo Task Manager — orquestra API, BFF e observabilidade local

scripts.postinstall: npm install --prefix api && npm install --prefix bff
scripts.start:dev: npm run obs:up && concurrently -k -n api,bff -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:bff"
scripts.start:apps: concurrently -k -n api,bff -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev:api" "npm run dev:bff"
scripts.sonar:all: npm run test:api && npm run sonar:api && npm run test:bff && npm run sonar:bff
